top_products: Solar Panels and Energy Storage Units

nodes.Company Description: Tesla, Inc. is an American multinational automotive and clean energy company that designs and manufactures electric vehicles, battery energy storage from home to grid-scale, solar panels, and solar roof tiles.
A global leader in GPU design, artificial intelligence, and accelerated computing platforms for gaming, professional visualization, and data centers.
The world's largest independent semiconductor foundry, responsible for manufacturing Nvidia's advanced chip architectures.
Primary manufacturer of Extreme Ultraviolet (EUV) and Deep Ultraviolet (DUV) lithography systems for chip production.
Develops and manufactures high-performance optical systems and mirrors for semiconductor lithography.
Provider of high-power CO2 laser systems used to generate the plasma required for EUV light sources.
Specializes in the development and production of complex mechatronic systems and precision components.
Global leader in materials engineering solutions used to produce almost every new chip and advanced display in the world.
Manufacturer of precision vacuum seals, quartz products, and ceramic components for semiconductor manufacturing.
World market leader in high-end vacuum valves for the semiconductor industry.
Provider of critical subsystems including gas delivery modules and fluid handling systems.
World-leading producer of high-purity silicon wafers and photoresist materials essential for semiconductor fabrication.
A major chemical and specialty materials company producing vinyl chloride monomer and soda ash.
A leading global mining group supplying raw industrial materials and minerals.
A premier provider of high-purity polycrystalline silicon for the semiconductor and solar industries.
A leading global supplier of dynamic random-access memory (DRAM) and flash memory chips.
The leading global provider of photolithography systems used to print circuits on silicon wafers.
Strategic partner providing high-performance optical systems, lenses, and mirrors for lithography machines.
Specialist in industrial lasers and laser system technology for industrial processing.
Industrial group specializing in the development and production of complex mechatronic systems and sub-assemblies.
A global leader in materials engineering solutions used to produce virtually every new chip in the world.
A leading developer and manufacturer of high-end vacuum valves for semiconductor and display manufacturing.
Specializes in the design and manufacture of critical fluid delivery subsystems for semiconductor capital equipment.
A developer and supplier of critical subsystems, ultra-high purity cleaning and analytical services.
The world's largest supplier of semiconductor silicon wafers and specialized chemical substrates.
A global leader in chemical production providing high-purity polysilicon for the semiconductor and solar industries.
A major North American producer of PVC and caustic soda, operating as a key strategic manufacturing arm.
Global provider of silicon-based technology and innovation used in consumer goods and infrastructure.
A multinational electronics contract manufacturer that assembles high-end server systems and graphics cards.
The world's largest dedicated independent semiconductor foundry, manufacturing high-performance logic chips.
Provider of photolithography systems essential for printing patterns on semiconductor wafers.
Manufacturer of high-purity silicon wafers and photoresists used in chip fabrication.
Global leader in materials engineering solutions for the semiconductor and display industries.
Manufacturer of advanced OLED and LCD display modules for mobile devices and laptops.
Manufacturer of specialty glass, ceramics, and related materials, primarily glass substrates for liquid crystal displays.
A leader in the research, development, and commercialization of phosphorescent OLED (PHOLED) technologies and materials.
A diversified chemical company providing materials for electronics, including polarizing films and photoresists.
Provider of semiconductor and infrastructure software solutions focusing on wired and wireless communication.
The world's largest dedicated independent semiconductor foundry, providing wafer fabrication services.
Provides assembly and testing services for integrated circuits.
A multinational electronics contract manufacturer that assembles network hardware and consumer electronics.
